name: write_file
description: Write content to a file atomically with auto-created parent directories and optional --dir for working directory.

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into before writing

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Content to write (omit or use - for stdin heredoc mode)

examples.expected: Writes to /app/evaluator/modules.go with auto-created parent directory

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd + multi-line cat-heredoc file creation into a single step; --dir eliminates separate cd step.
